name: Red Blue Cell
short_description: This is a retro barrage flying shooting game. Drive a space fighter plane, shuttle between planets and space stations, and use powerful firepower to destroy enemy space battleships! !
detailed_description:
This is a retro barrage flying shooting game. Drive a space fighter plane, shuttle between planets and space stations, and use powerful firepower to destroy enemy space battleships! !

Features:

- Drive a space fighter, destroy enemies with powerful firepower, and avoid barrages with superb driving skills!

– Various levels and more than ten large BOSS are waiting for you to challenge! !

– Take you back to the nostalgic retro pixel style of the 1990s.

– The music is also in retro 8bit style! !

supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
